chapter_title.en: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)

text: 5864 - وَ رَوَى مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ سِنَانٍ عَنْ طَلْحَةَ بْنِ زَيْدٍ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ اَلصَّادِقِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ يَقُولُ : "اَلْعَامِلُ عَلَى غَيْرِ بَصِيرَةٍ كَالسَّائِرِ عَلَى غَيْرِ اَلطَّرِيقِ فَلاَ تَزِيدُهُ سُرْعَةُ اَلسَّيْرِ مِنَ اَلطَّرِيقِ إِلاَّ بُعْداً".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5864 - Muhammad ibn Sinan narrated from Talhah ibn Zayd, who said:
"I heard Abu Abdullah Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as), peace be upon him, say:
'One who acts without insight is like a traveler walking off the path. The faster he moves, the farther he becomes from the correct way.'"
